title: Digital Literacy
subject: Computer Science
learning_objectives: Manage hierarchical folders and file extensions.

key_vocabulary.definition: Starting up a computer and loading its OS.

content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Digital Literacy
Digital literacy starts with navigating operational file hierarchies and safely managing directories.
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.

content.question: What type of booting occurs when restarting an already running PC?
content.explanation: Warm booting is restarting an active computer using software cues.
